creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
(In reply to Frank Reisert from comment #46)

I would guess that pfnGetImport is supLoadModuleResolveImport from src/VBox/HostDrivers/Support/SUPLibLdr.cpp, because the log file contains "SUP: RTLdrGetBits failed for VMMR0.r0" which is generated where supLoadModuleInner calls RTLdrGetBits in that file.

I think SymValue is the address in memory, so you won't find it in any readelf output.

Do you know the name of the symbol?  Can you find the relocation in the output of readelf?
